supersede_note: Skill 57 is the canonical weekly-social engine (see BOUNDARY-35-vs-57.md). v0.2.0 IS the 35<->57 merge target (MERGE-INTEGRATION-PLAN.md, QC 9.2 APPROVED): the seven Skill-35 extras are FOLDED IN (twitter parity C1, live discovery C2, podcast audio C3, newsletter C4, blog C5, engage C6, thumbnails+stories C7) and four honestly DEFER to named versions (narrated Reels v0.3.0, syndicate v0.4.0, persona+memory adapters v0.5.0) via fail-closed stubs. 35 -> ARCHIVED per-client only after 57 proves parity end-to-end. During coexistence: 35 delegates the core to 57; 57 NEVER delegates to 35. v0.2.2: the per-client 35->57 migration (retire the skill35-weekly-theme Saturday cron, re-point state, prevent double-posting) is now MECHANIZED as scripts/migrate-35-to-57.sh — atomic (retire-35-confirmed-then-register-57, never both armed), idempotent (re-run until exit 0), client-config-GATED (a box without the client's own GHL/OpenRouter/Kie/Gemini config is cleanly SKIPPED, exit 8, untouched), silent (never posts/probes/messages), with a machine receipt and --rollback. It remains an OPERATOR-TRIGGERED per-box step: fleet rolls only refresh files and NEVER run it; archiving the 35 directory stays a separate operator step after the independent live parity verify. The cron registrar itself (scripts/register-social-cron.sh) is v2: it registers in the OpenClaw GATEWAY cron store — the store the live skill35-weekly-theme cron actually lives in (the v1 crontab-only port could not retire it = the double-post hole; and fleet VPS containers have no cron daemon, so a crontab entry would never fire).

creative_layer.override_logging: AF-SM-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED (a silent deviation is the only forbidden deviation)

provider_rules.posting: client GHL Private Integration Token + locationId + connected social accounts

cron.name: social-media-weekly-theme
cron.config_gate: client config required (preflight required-fields + secrets-SET) or the box is skipped untouched (exit 8)
cron.trigger: operator-explicit per box; never auto-run by a fleet roll
cron.invariant: exactly one weekly-theme cron per box across BOTH stores (gateway + crontab); legacy skill35-weekly-theme/weekly-batch retired and confirmed gone BEFORE 57 registers

capability_gated: media modes require client Kie.ai + Gemini keys; preflight blocks gracefully with a labeled report
podcast requires client Fish-Audio + Podbean; unconfigured -> PODCAST_DEFERRED labeled skip, never a failure
